# Templates

Reusable templates organized by category.

## Grilling

Templates for grilling sessions (design decision interviews).

- [`grilling/GRILLING-SESSION-RESPONSE.template.md`](grilling/GRILLING-SESSION-RESPONSE.template.md) — per-branch response format
- [`grilling/GRILLING-SESSION-STATE.template.md`](grilling/GRILLING-SESSION-STATE.template.md) — session-wide state tracker

## Feature Review

Templates for automated feature review reports.

- [`FEATURE_REVIEW.template.md`](FEATURE_REVIEW.template.md) — feature review report with acceptance criteria verdicts, QA results, findings, and recommendation

## UI

Templates for UI and component design.

- [`ui/COMPONENT.lld.template.md`](ui/COMPONENT.lld.template.md) — low-level design document for React components
